scripts.add-pkg: sh -c 'pip3.11 install "$0" && echo "$(pip3.11 freeze | grep ^$0==)" >> requirements.txt'
scripts.lint:api: cd api && ./venv/bin/python -m isort . && ./venv/bin/python -m black . && ./venv/bin/python -m ruff check .
scripts.docker-up:dev: sh sh_files/setup_n8n_files.sh && HOST_PROJECT_DIR=$(pwd) docker compose --env-file .env -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker-up:prod: sh sh_files/setup_n8n_files.sh && HOST_PROJECT_DIR=$(pwd) docker compose --env-file .env -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker-up:prod-main: sh sh_files/setup_n8n_files.sh && HOST_PROJECT_DIR=$(pwd) docker compose --env-file .env -f docker/docker-compose.prod-main.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker-up:prod-worker: sh sh_files/setup_n8n_files.sh && HOST_PROJECT_DIR=$(pwd) docker compose --env-file .env -f docker/docker-compose.prod-worker.yml up --build -d
scripts.docker:dev: npm run docker-down:dev && rm -rf loki-data/* && npm run docker-up:dev
scripts.docker-update-images: docker pull n8nio/n8n && docker pull nginx:alpine && docker pull postgres:15 && docker pull redis:7-alpine && docker pull minio/minio:latest && docker pull grafana/loki:latest && docker pull grafana/promtail:latest
scripts.docker:prod: npm run docker-update-images && npm run docker-down:prod && rm -rf loki-data/* && npm run docker-up:prod
scripts.docker:prod-main: npm run docker-update-images && npm run docker-down:prod-main && rm -rf loki-data/* && npm run docker-up:prod-main
scripts.docker:prod-worker: npm run docker-update-images && npm run docker-down:prod-worker && rm -rf loki-data/* && npm run docker-up:prod-worker
scripts.docker-update: docker pull n8nio/n8n && npm run docker-down:prod && npm run docker-up:prod
scripts.docker-rm-cache: docker container prune -f && docker image prune -a -f && docker volume prune -f && docker builder prune -a -f
